specific_question: How many times has the company been required to issue recalls due to violating car safety regulations?
answer: Since its inception in 2010, Elexion Automotive has issued car recalls only once, in 2019. It was due to faulty tire pressure sensors on two 2017 models.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive ensure product compliance with CARB's 100% ZEV sales mandate by 2035 in California?
